prompt: Migrate DateUtils.java to use Kotlin's kotlin.time and kotlinx-datetime APIs instead of Java's java.util.Date and java.text.SimpleDateFormat. The file has no existing tests. It is a pure utility class with about 8 public static methods.

assertions.text: A behavior-spec.md is produced capturing method signatures, normal behaviors, edge cases, and quirks
Spec is explicitly presented to user for confirmation before Phase 3 begins
Characterization tests are written to capture actual behavior before any migration code
Timezone implicit dependency (using default timezone) is identified as a quirk that must be preserved
SimpleDateFormat lenient parsing behavior is identified as a quirk to be documented
